description: Apollo.io is a B2B sales platform with a 275M+ contact database, email and phone finding, sequences, and a built-in dialer.
tagline: Find, engage, and close your ideal buyers
overview: Apollo.io combines a large B2B contact database with outbound tools so sales teams can find prospects, enrich records, and run multichannel sequences from one place.
what_is: Apollo.io is a sales intelligence and engagement platform built for outbound teams. It pairs a contact and company database of more than 275 million records with email finding, phone numbers, and CRM enrichment, so reps can build targeted lists without juggling separate data tools.

Teams use Apollo to prospect, verify contact data, and run email and call sequences, then sync everything back to their CRM. It fits sales development and full-cycle reps who want lead data and outreach in a single workflow.
Apollo is not a full marketing automation suite or a replacement for a primary CRM, but it works alongside tools like HubSpot and Salesforce to keep pipeline data current and outreach moving.
